translate_page.placeholder_source: Type what you want to translate
translate_page.placeholder_custom_prompt: e.g. keep it casual, gamer slang, travel phrases
translate_page.description_clean_source_text: Rejoin words split across line breaks and fix spacing from PDFs or scans. Keep off for poetry, lyrics, or code.

settings_page.title: Settings
settings_page.security_notice: API keys are stored only in your browser's localStorage. They never leave your device.
settings_page.default_model_placeholder: Add at least one model first
settings_page.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this?
settings_page.error_base_url_invalid: That doesn't look like a valid URL. Example: https://api.example.com/v1
settings_page.error_models_required: Please enter at least one model.
settings_page.editor_empty_desc: Select a provider from the list to edit it, or add a new one below.
settings_page.editor_picker_prompt: Choose what kind of provider to add
settings_page.editor_preset_desc: Pre-configured providers like OpenAI and Gemini
settings_page.editor_custom_desc: Fill in everything yourself — baseURL, models, etc.
settings_page.editor_openai_compat_desc: Paste an OpenAI-compatible URL and we'll pre-fill common models
settings_page.no_unconfigured_presets: No more presets available to add.

glossary_page.title: Glossary
glossary_page.empty_message: No terms yet. Add one to lock how it translates.

history_page.title: History
history_page.limit_notice: Once you pass 100 entries, the oldest ones get removed automatically.

errors.NO_API_KEY: Add your API key in Settings first.
errors.NO_ACTIVE_PROVIDER: No active provider. Pick one in Settings.
errors.INVALID_REQUEST: The request didn't look right. Try again.
errors.INVALID_API_KEY: That API key didn't work. Double-check it in Settings.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Give it a minute and try again.
errors.PROVIDER_ERROR: The translation service is having a moment. Try again shortly.
errors.STREAM_INTERRUPTED: Translation got cut off. Check your connection.
errors.STORAGE_FULL: Storage is full. Try deleting some old history.
errors.INVALID_FILE_TYPE: Only .txt and .pdf files can be uploaded.
errors.PDF_NO_TEXT: Couldn't pull text out of that PDF. It might be a scanned file.
errors.PDF_EXTRACTION_FAILED: Something went wrong reading that PDF.
